landing.heroDesc: PR-TOP is an AI-powered practice assistant for psychologists and therapists — built to reduce routine, support continuity between sessions, and keep care human.
landing.featuresDesc: Every feature is designed around the real workflow of psychologists and therapists: clearer communication, better continuity, and less daily friction.
landing.pricingDesc: Start with a free trial. Upgrade as your practice grows.
landing.feature1Desc: Keep important client context organized and easier to revisit. Never lose track of progress between sessions.
landing.feature2Desc: All sensitive client data is encrypted at the application layer. Your clients' privacy is our top priority.
landing.feature3Desc: Draft thoughtful follow-ups, reminders, and support messages faster. Focus on therapy, not admin.
landing.feature4Desc: Clients interact through Telegram — no new apps to install. Diary entries, exercises, and SOS alerts in their existing messenger.
landing.feature5Desc: Bring more clarity and structure to your day-to-day private practice with visual dashboards and analytics.
landing.feature6Desc: Reduce repeated tasks so more time and energy stay with the work that matters — attention, presence, and care.

guide.title: Therapist Guide
guide.subtitle: Step-by-step instructions for using all features of the service
guide.section1Body: The dashboard is your main workspace. Here you can see key statistics at a glance, recent client activity, and manage your invite code.
guide.section1Stat1: Active Clients — the number of clients currently linked to you
guide.section1Stat3: Notes — your private therapist notes count
guide.section1Stat4: Active SOS — currently unresolved SOS alerts from clients
guide.section1Activity: The activity feed shows recent diary entries, sessions, SOS events, and notes in chronological order. Each item shows the client name, type, and time.
guide.section1Invite: Your invite code is a unique code you share with clients so they can connect to you through the Telegram bot. You can copy it or regenerate a new one at any time.
guide.section1Badge: The subscription badge in the header shows your current plan (Trial, Basic, Pro, or Premium) and remaining trial days if applicable.
guide.section2Body: The Clients page displays all clients linked to your account. Use the search bar to filter by email or Telegram ID.
guide.section2Dot1: Green dot — client was active within the last day
guide.section2Dot2: Teal dot — client was active within the last 7 days
guide.section2Dot3: Amber dot — client was active within the last 30 days
guide.section2Dot4: Gray dot — client has been inactive for more than 30 days
guide.section2Consent: The consent status shows whether the client has granted permission for you to access their data. Consent can be granted or revoked by the client at any time. When consent is revoked, the client's data is hidden from all views including dashboard, search, and analytics.
guide.section2Open: Click on any client row to open their detailed profile with timeline, diary, notes, sessions, exercises, and context tabs.
guide.section3Body: Each client profile has six tabs giving you a complete view of the therapeutic relationship:
guide.section3Tab1Desc: A unified chronological view of all events — diary entries, sessions, notes, exercises, and SOS alerts. Filter by date range and event type.
guide.section3Tab2Desc: Client's diary entries including text, voice, and video messages. Filter by type and date range. Supports infinite scroll for large histories.
guide.section3Tab3Desc: Your private therapist notes. Create, edit, and delete notes about the client. These are only visible to you.
guide.section3Tab4Desc: Client context including anamnesis/history, current therapy goals, contraindications, and AI instructions. This information helps maintain continuity between sessions.
guide.section3Tab5Desc: List of recorded sessions with links to detailed views. Upload audio files for automatic transcription and AI-generated summaries.
guide.section3Tab6Desc: Assign exercises to the client from the exercise library. Track which exercises have been delivered and view client responses.
guide.section4Body: Sessions allow you to record and analyze therapy sessions. You can upload audio recordings for automatic transcription and AI-powered summarization.
guide.section4Step1: Upload — select and upload an audio file from your device
guide.section4Step2: Transcribing — the system automatically converts speech to text (this may take a few minutes)
guide.section4Step3: Complete — the transcript and AI-generated summary are ready for review
guide.section4Statuses: Each session shows its current status and whether audio, transcript, and summary are available. Click on a session to view full details.
guide.section5Body: The Exercise Library contains structured therapeutic exercises organized into six categories:
guide.section5Cat1: Breathing & Relaxation — breathing techniques and progressive relaxation exercises
guide.section5Cat4: Journaling — guided writing and reflection prompts
guide.section5Cat5: Behavioral — behavioral activation and habit-building exercises
guide.section5Assign: To assign an exercise to a client: go to the client's Exercises tab, click 'Send Exercise', browse or search the library, and select the exercise to send.
guide.section6Body: Clients can press the SOS button in their Telegram bot when they need urgent support. You will be notified through your configured channels:
guide.section6Channel1: Telegram notifications — receive alerts directly in Telegram
guide.section6Channel2: Email notifications — get email alerts for SOS events
guide.section6Channel3: Web push notifications — browser push notifications on desktop
guide.section6Channel4: Sound alert — audible notification on the dashboard
guide.section6Quiet: Quiet hours allow you to delay non-urgent notifications during specified times (e.g., nighttime). SOS alerts during quiet hours are held until the quiet period ends, with a configurable escalation delay.
guide.section6Recommend: When you receive an SOS alert, we recommend responding as soon as possible. The SOS section on the dashboard shows all active alerts requiring attention.
guide.section7Body: The Analytics page provides visual insights into client activity and your practice:
guide.section7Chart1: Activity by client — compare engagement levels across clients
guide.section7Chart2: Sessions by status — see the distribution of session statuses
guide.section7Chart3: Stacked activity timeline — diary entries, sessions, and notes plotted over time
guide.section7DateRange: Use the date range selector to focus on specific time periods. Hover over chart elements to see detailed tooltips with exact values.
guide.section8Body: Configure your account preferences and manage your subscription:
guide.section8Lang: Language — switch the interface between English, Russian, and Spanish
guide.section8Tz: Timezone — set your timezone for correct date/time display
guide.section8Plans: Subscription plans: Trial (14 days free), Basic, Pro, Premium — each with different client and session limits
guide.section8Upgrade: To upgrade your plan, go to the Subscription page and select your desired plan. Payment is handled securely through Stripe.
guide.section8History: View your payment history and manage billing on the Subscription page
guide.faq1Q: How does a client connect to me?
guide.faq1A: Share your unique invite code with your client. They enter it in the Telegram bot to link their account to yours. You can find and copy your invite code on the Dashboard.
guide.faq2Q: What happens if a client revokes consent?
guide.faq2A: If a client revokes consent, all their sensitive data becomes inaccessible to you: diary entries, session recordings, transcripts, summaries, exercises, SOS alerts, and search results. Their data is also excluded from your dashboard statistics, activity feed, and analytics. Your own therapist notes remain accessible. The link is preserved and access is fully restored when the client re-grants consent.
guide.faq3Q: How does SOS work at night (quiet hours)?
guide.faq3A: During quiet hours, non-urgent notifications are delayed. SOS alerts are held and delivered as soon as the quiet period ends, or after the configured escalation delay, whichever comes first.
guide.faq4A: Yes. All sensitive client data (diary entries, notes, transcripts, summaries) is encrypted at the application layer before being stored in the database. This means even database access does not expose raw client data.
guide.faq5Q: How do I change my subscription plan?
guide.faq5A: Go to the Subscription page from the sidebar. You can upgrade immediately or schedule a downgrade for the end of your current billing period. Payment is handled securely through Stripe.
guide.faq6Q: What happens if my subscription expires?
guide.faq6A: If your subscription expires, you will be redirected to the Subscription page to select a new plan. Your data is safely preserved and will be accessible again once you subscribe.
guide.faq7A: Yes! On any client's profile, click 'Export All Data' to download their complete data as JSON or CSV (ZIP). JSON includes profile, context, diary, sessions, notes, exercises, and SOS events. CSV bundles separate files in a ZIP archive. Trial/Basic plans can export diary data in JSON; Pro/Premium plans unlock full export with all data types and CSV format. Analytics can also be exported from the Analytics page.
guide.faq8A: Voice messages and audio recordings are processed through our speech-to-text pipeline. The audio is uploaded, transcribed automatically, and an AI-generated summary is created. The process typically takes a few minutes.
guide.faq9A: AI instructions in the client's Context tab allow you to set boundaries and guidelines for how AI processes that client's data. For example, you can specify topics to avoid or particular approaches to emphasize.
guide.faq10A: For technical support, reach out via the contact information on the landing page. We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours.

pwa.installDesc: Install the app for a faster, native-like experience with offline support.
pwa.offline: You are offline. Some features may be unavailable.
